title: Zephyr gateway: duplicate /config registered on one CoAP service (spec schema vs gateway schema)
description: lichen/apps/gateway defines a gateway-specific /config schema ({tx_power_dbm, manual_location{...}}, apps/gateway/src/config_cbor.c, handlers at main.c:459-510) AND the spec-schema coap_config.c lichen_config resource is also linked into the same lichen_coap service (COAP_RESOURCE_DEFINE in coap_config.c:829-834; gateway prj.conf sets CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_CONFIG=y; service at apps/gateway/src/main.c:504-517). Two handlers for /config on one service - which wins is registration-order dependent. DECISION NEEDED: rename the gateway-specific path (e.g. /gateway/config) or drop CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_CONFIG from the gateway build.
